creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Sat, Mar 14, 2009 at 09:55:16AM -0700, bf wrote:
> Mark: In the future, what size limit should I observe?

In theory .5M, but remember, we mirror the gnats db all over the
world, so really I'd prefer something much smaller than that.

I don't see a reason to keep things like this is the db permanently
(there is no 'scrubbing').

mcl
